notes: KARIMO installer copied usable assets but exited on missing .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/karimo-task.yml; repo-local config and PRD were completed manually.
Default shell is Node v24.12.0, but the full internal beta gate passed through mise Node 22.22.2.
Nutrition logging now supports source metadata, editable AI drafts, barcode/manual fallback, ingredients, correction tracking, and recent-food relogging.
Workout logging now supports previous-set autofill, previous hints, set type, RPE, RIR, notes, and API persistence for set metadata.
OpenAPI was updated and generated React/Zod clients were regenerated.
India-aware global food logging foundations now include food catalog, member foods, lookup telemetry, barcode/search/custom food APIs, and server-side provider fallbacks.
Hevy-level workout foundations now include exercise catalog/custom exercise APIs, normalized completed-set history, exercise history, bounded analytics, and metric-specific PR storage.
The full internal beta gate passed through mise Node 22.22.2 after the database/API foundation work.
Member app food search now uses API-first catalogue lookup with local curated fallback, and barcode lookup now populates editable drafts with label/manual fallback.
All workout start paths now hydrate previous sets from history, and active exercise cards show last/best history when available.
A real-user validation plan exists for India-aware mixed-diet food logging, barcode fallback, AI correction, and repeated workout logging.
AI rate-limit route tests now pin in-memory test configuration to avoid ambient env drift.
